dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Initial dose The usual starting dose of Phenelzine Sulfate Tablets is one tablet (15 mg) three times a day. Early phase treatment Dosage should be increased to at least 60 mg per day at a fairly rapid pace consistent with patient tolerance. It may be necessary to increase dosage up to 90 mg per day to obtain sufficient MAO inhibition.
